creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #4)

Thanks for taking a look. I'll use do-fetch!

fwiw there's at least one other person out there doing this: https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/discussions/1017

For anyone interested:

do-fetch:
	if [ ! -f ${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} ]; then /usr/local/bin/curl -o ${DISTDIR}/${DISTFILES} -s -f -H "Authorization: token ${GH_TOKEN}" https://codeload.github.com/${GH_ACCOUNT}/${GH_PROJECT}/tar.gz/${GH_TAGNAME} ; fi
